title: Two Rainy Miles
subtitle: 水水和爸爸的小雨两公里挑战
theme: 雨天骑行、坚持完成挑战、温暖陪伴
moral: 小小的坚持，会带来大大的开心；有人陪伴时，勇敢可以慢慢长出来。

pages.narration: 周六早晨，小雨沙沙下。小区门口，新修的砖红色小道亮亮的，像一条长长的红丝带。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 水水，今天我们挑战两公里，好不好？

pages.composition_hint: a high-angle wide view of a brick-red community path with a white center line in light rain, shuishui in a transparent raincoat on a small bicycle with training wheels, a red panda in a gray raincoat walking beside her, small trees and flowers along both sides

pages.narration: 水水戴好小帽檐，踩上脚踏板。小自行车两边的平衡轮，咕噜咕噜等着出发。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of shuishui adjusting on a small bicycle with two training wheels, transparent raincoat and rain boots visible, a red panda in a gray raincoat standing nearby on the brick-red path, both faces clear

pages.narration: 爸爸轻轻一挥手，挑战开始啦！水水的小车沿着白线，一点一点往前骑。
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter close-up view of shuishui smiling while pedaling along the white center line, transparent raincoat dotted with raindrops, a red panda in a gray raincoat walking beside her and smiling

pages.narration: 小道左转了。右边长长的高铁墙上，有一排玻璃窗，里面忽然闪过一列火车。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 它跑远路，我们骑两公里，都很棒。

pages.composition_hint: from behind: shuishui rides a small bicycle with training wheels and a red panda walks beside her as they follow the brick-red path turning left, a tall high-speed rail wall with long glass windows on the right showing a passing train shape

pages.narration: 草地边，有一个还没盖好的黑黑下水道洞。水水把车骑慢了，耳朵也竖起来。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 不是怪兽，是下水道洞。我们离它远一点，从白线这边走。

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view on a RED ASPHALT path with a white center line: shuishui rides her small training-wheel bike on the LEFT side of the path in a transparent raincoat; a red panda in a gray raincoat walks on the RIGHT side, protectively between her and a dark round uncovered drain hole that sits well back in the grass away from the path edge, with small orange warning cones around it; both faces visible, shuishui looking curious and a little cautious

pages.narration: 他们把黑洞留在身后,继续往前。小路弯弯曲曲,一眼望不到尽头。
pages.composition_hint: a high-angle view from just above the red panda's head height, looking FORWARD down a long RED ASPHALT road with a white center line that winds and curves into the far distance with no end in sight; young trees and patches of little flowers along both sides in light rain; far ahead and small on the path, shuishui on her training-wheel bike in a transparent raincoat with the red panda in a gray raincoat walking beside her

pages.narration: 前面出现了一座彩虹拱门，红、橙、黄、绿、蓝，像雨天的小桥。爸爸拿出手机，给水水拍照。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 水水，给彩虹一个大笑脸！

pages.composition_hint: an over-the-shoulder medium view from behind-and-to-the-side of a red panda in a gray raincoat holding up a phone to photograph shuishui ahead under a rainbow-colored arch over the brick-red path; shuishui poses on a small bicycle with training wheels, transparent raincoat visible, NOT a selfie

pages.narration: 骑了一会儿，水水的小手冰冰的。爸爸停在路边，把她的手轻轻包在自己的手心里。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level close-up view of a red panda in a gray raincoat standing beside shuishui and gently holding her small paws to warm them, shuishui seated on a small bicycle with training wheels in a transparent raincoat, soft raindrops on sleeves

pages.narration: 暖暖电充好了！他们又经过两座彩虹拱门，一座像糖果，一座像积木。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 第一座、第二座、第三座！我数对啦！

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of the brick-red path passing through two rainbow-colored arches, shuishui riding a small bicycle with training wheels in a transparent raincoat, a red panda in a gray raincoat walking beside her, light rain and flowers along the path

pages.narration: 水水的小腿有点累了，脚踏板也变重了。可是地铁站的屋顶，已经在前面露出来。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 累了可以慢，挑战还可以继续。

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter medium view of shuishui pedaling slowly but steadily on a small bicycle with training wheels, a red panda in a gray raincoat walking beside her, a metro station roof and pedestrian overpass visible ahead through light rain

pages.narration: 终于，他们到了终点——地铁站！旁边有人行天桥，还有一家热乎乎的包子店。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 真的到啦，两公里完成一半，回家就是全挑战！

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of a modern metro station entrance with a pedestrian overpass and a small steamed-bun shop sign nearby, shuishui on a small bicycle with training wheels in a transparent raincoat, a red panda in a gray raincoat standing on the brick-red path beside her

pages.narration: 回去的路，雨还在下，花还在点头。水水听着车轮咕噜声，心里也咕噜咕噜地开心。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 是呀，远远的路，被你一小段一小段骑完了。

pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of the rainy brick-red path with small trees and flowers, shuishui steering a small bicycle with training wheels in a transparent raincoat, a red panda in a gray raincoat walking ahead holding a short rope, both faces partly turned and visible

pages.narration: 终点就在前面啦!水水用力蹬,爸爸笑着跟跑——两公里,马上就要骑完!冲呀!

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 是你自己，一直没有放弃。

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter FRONT view of shuishui pedaling hard on her training-wheel bike in a transparent raincoat and a red panda in a gray raincoat running happily beside her, both rushing toward the finish at the end of the RED ASPHALT road, big bright excited joyful smiles, raindrops in the air, a triumphant sense of achievement

pages.narration: 两公里,往返一整圈,水水自己骑完啦!挑战成功!
pages.composition_hint: a flat top-down cartoon CELEBRATION CARD (a designed achievement card, not a real scene): a long rectangular community map seen from above with many little cartoon apartment buildings; around the OUTER edge of the community runs an L-shaped winding RED path; a bright BLUE dotted line is drawn along that red path tracing a round-trip route (out and back); two cute round cartoon HEAD-STICKER badges, one of shuishui the white rabbit and one of the red panda, smiling; a gold trophy, little triumphant flags, and colorful confetti scattered around; large playful celebratory title text reading exactly "2KM" with a smaller "CHALLENGE DONE" beneath it; bright cheerful happy design
